name: Mumbo Jumbo
oneLine: English Minecraft YouTuber known for elaborate redstone contraptions and his long tenure on the Hermitcraft SMP.
bio: Oli Brotherhood, born 1995, is one of Minecraft's best-known redstone engineers and the most-subscribed member of the Hermitcraft server, which he joined at the start of Season 2. His videos showcase practical and decorative redstone builds, base tours and SMP storylines, with a moustache-themed brand. He has been part of long-running Hermitcraft groups including Architech (with Grian and Iskall85), the Buttercups (with Grian and GoodTimesWithScar) and the C-Team.
notable: Buttercups duo with Grian and Scar
